## What changed

Describe the user-visible outcome and why it belongs in MDGraph.

## Verification

- [ ] Focused tests added or updated where applicable
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] Relevant tests pass
- [ ] `npm run build` and smoke checks run for public behavior changes
- [ ] English and Chinese docs updated together for public behavior changes
- [ ] `npm run task:public-check`

## Boundaries and publication safety

- [ ] Core behavior remains deterministic and local-first
- [ ] No private documents, graph databases, secrets, full transcripts, or personal paths are included
- [ ] Public output or contract changes are documented
